why_t50_not_improved.switching_wrong_samples: not primary; val-selected t50 policies mostly fall back because test-safe gains are not reliable
why_t50_not_improved.track_length_insufficient: not proven; t50 rows exist, but track_length is audit-only and cannot be used as deployment feature
why_t50_not_improved.goal_feature_inaccurate: likely; held-out UCY test scenes mostly lack train-scene goal availability
why_t50_not_improved.t50_baseline_too_strong: scene_clamped_baseline is strong enough that learned switches fail validation/test gates

final_metrics.reason: Stage36 final external policy; t50 remains a hard gate.

blocker: t50 selector has oracle headroom but insufficient reliable causal features/goal context to pass the >3% t50 deployment gate.
next_shortest_path: build external train-only scene packs/goals for held-out style scenes without using test endpoints
add full causal history windows to estimate curvature/TTC instead of zero proxies
train per-dataset t50 selectors and validate on held-out scenes before mixing domains
